title: thelypteris eminens
intro: Thelypteris eminens, also known as the goldenbacked leather fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris eminens include its ability to soothe irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
